properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I stood in the barnyard looking around At the chickens picking on the ground And Something inside keeps telling me I was not earth bound

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Then one day I heard my mama scream What's the matter with you Why do you live in a dream You are an eagle You were born to fly

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now I'm flying where no other bird can fly In a supernatural atmosphere high in the sky Seeing things that I've never seen He is taking me places I've never been And the higher I go is the more I see I'm now living in the reality I am an eagle. I was born free

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Higher and higher I rise each day I'm rising to a perfect faith Rising on the mighty rushing wind Rising above the rhythm of the music Rising above the clapping of hands Rising above the joy of the saints

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The devil tried his best to cage and deceive me But then God sent His Word to me He delivered me And He's given me a law inside to fly And soon I'll soar through heaven's door
